title: Simplified Process for Internal Market Movements (SPIMM) and UK Carrier (UKC) Scheme: CDS Declaration and Customs Clearance Request Instructions
body: " This guidance should only be used if you are importing goods into Northern Ireland (NI) from Great Britain (GB) using SPIMM and UKC Scheme.  If you are not using SPIMM and UKC Scheme then you should find out which scheme or process you need to follow.  "

taxons.title: UK Trade Tariff and classification of goods
